---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to the README, docs/, JSDoc, OpenAPI spec, or SDK references
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["documentation", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

### What is Missing or Unclear?

A short description of the gap. Link the file or section that needs work
(e.g. `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md#kubernetes-example`).

### Proposed Change

What you would add, remove, or rewrite. Sample wording, code, or a sketch
is helpful.

### Why?

A sentence or two on the reader's pain point this would solve. Examples
are great.

### Checklist

- [ ] I have read the relevant docs in `docs/`.
- [ ] I have checked the OpenAPI spec and Postman collection for accuracy.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request.
